{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321221256C7699075F5D1D5BACD63"}"},"total":546},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537252088462918425","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一章的简单介绍使我成见增大，误以为是什么委屈流苟隐忍那种，外加评分只有7.5导致之前看到文也没兴趣看下去，没想到第三章开始惊艳我了出手果断狠辣，砍手断腿[害羞][害羞]爽死我了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754906497,"group_id":"7500617174310980633","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"老书虫的快乐源泉你想象不到～诶嘿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Jc9v7j6qmm1TasTvicadldbLDhIeIy3T9+movR06hL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6f3cacf4fd6e419a980c7bddc42cd098~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623761&x-signature=Wb%2F%2B4VuMNs1mu%2BgZXzauc%2FbjCxs%3D","user_id":"2711853809286733","user_name":"嗷呜的牟牟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2711853809286733","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7500617174310980633","book_info":{"abstract":"【反派+背景无敌+后悔倒追+狠辣+多女主】
穿越成为秦家长子，女友是云海市第一美人，坐拥百亿家业继承权。
然而秦歌慌得一批。
他竟是书中最大反派！
即将被下山高手踩死，成为气运之子成功路上的垫脚石？
幸好剧情还没开启，尚有扭转的局面。
什么？
还有反派系统绑定？
只要搞人心态，就有丰厚奖励？
秦歌表示，谁说反派不好当来着？这反派也太棒啦！
……
高手下山后，望着与秦歌成双入对的青梅竹马，悲愤欲绝，
“那是我的发小！”
“那是我的梦中情人！！”
“那是我的漂亮师姐！！！”
“那是我的美女师父啊！！！！”
佣兵之王；
豪门弃少：
……
龙王：“那是我的女儿！怎么叫他爸爸？”
“那是我的老婆啊！”
气运之子齐齐怒吼，“谁让他当大反派的？！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/af2ccaf2ec427fa402e2423d495ff1ba","author":"除魔卫道","author_id":"","book_id":"7500617174310980633","book_name":"都重生反派了，谁还追气运之女啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7501251790239711769","read_count":"55111","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1181619"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"520","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,反派,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e2171dc1652875c6db1fd98eb028398~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286376&x-signature=YvAHHrMOwQvW%2FU%2BoLbKq8uZURYg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4410836807588780","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321221256C7699075F5D1D5BACD63"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"li
